SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.model.board

Interface Board

All Known Implementing Classes:
SimpleBoard
public interface Board
Core game logic interface for the Tetris board. Handles board state, brick movement, rotation, collision detection, and row clearing.
Author:
Dong, Jia.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addGarbageLine()
    Adds a garbage line to the bottom of the board.
    ClearRow
    clearRows()
    Checks the board for completed rows, removes them, shifts the remaining rows down, calculates the score bonus, and returns the results.
    boolean
    createNewBrick()
    Spawns a new brick at the top of the board.
    int[][]
    getBoardMatrix()
    Gets the current board grid state.
    int
    getGhostBrickY()
    Calculates the ghost brick position (where the brick would land if dropped straight down).
    Brick
    getHeldBrick()
    Gets the currently held brick.
    Score
    getScore()
    Gets the current score object.
    int
    getTotalLinesCleared()
    Gets the total number of lines cleared in the current game.
    ViewData
    getViewData()
    Gets the current view data (brick shape, position, next brick shape).
    int
    hardDropBrick()
    Hard drops the brick to the bottom instantly.
    boolean
    holdBrick()
    Holds the current brick for later use.
    void
    mergeBrickToBackground()
    Merges the currently falling brick permanently onto the board grid.
    boolean
    moveBrickDown()
    Moves the falling brick one position down.
    boolean
    moveBrickLeft()
    Moves the brick one position left.
    boolean
    moveBrickRight()
    Moves the brick one position right.
    void
    newGame()
    Resets the board state for a new game.
    int
    removeGarbageLines(int linesToRemove)
    Removes garbage lines from the bottom of the board.
    boolean
    rotateLeftBrick()
    Rotates the brick clockwise.
    boolean
    rotateRightBrick()
    Rotates the brick counterclockwise.

  • Method Details

    • moveBrickDown

      boolean moveBrickDown()
      Moves the falling brick one position down.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false if collision occurred (brick lands)

    • hardDropBrick

      int hardDropBrick()
      Hard drops the brick to the bottom instantly.
      Returns:
      Number of rows dropped

    • moveBrickLeft

      boolean moveBrickLeft()
      Moves the brick one position left.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false if collision occurred

    • moveBrickRight

      boolean moveBrickRight()
      Moves the brick one position right.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false if collision occurred

    • rotateLeftBrick

      boolean rotateLeftBrick()
      Rotates the brick clockwise.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false if collision occurred

    • rotateRightBrick

      boolean rotateRightBrick()
      Rotates the brick counterclockwise.
      Returns:
      true if successful, false if collision occurred

    • createNewBrick

      boolean createNewBrick()
      Spawns a new brick at the top of the board.
      Returns:
      true if spawn collision occurs (game over), false otherwise

    • getBoardMatrix

      int[][] getBoardMatrix()
      Gets the current board grid state.
      Returns:
      Board matrix (0 = empty, non-zero = occupied)

    • getViewData

      ViewData getViewData()
      Gets the current view data (brick shape, position, next brick shape).
      Returns:
      A ViewData object containing the necessary information for the GUI.

    • mergeBrickToBackground

      void mergeBrickToBackground()
      Merges the currently falling brick permanently onto the board grid. This happens when the brick lands after moving down.

    • clearRows

      ClearRow clearRows()
      Checks the board for completed rows, removes them, shifts the remaining rows down, calculates the score bonus, and returns the results.
      Returns:
      A ClearRow object containing details about the cleared lines.

    • getScore

      Score getScore()
      Gets the current score object.
      Returns:
      The Score instance.

    • getTotalLinesCleared

      int getTotalLinesCleared()
      Gets the total number of lines cleared in the current game.
      Returns:
      The total lines cleared.

    • newGame

      void newGame()
      Resets the board state for a new game. Clears the board matrix, resets the score, and creates the first new brick.

    • holdBrick

      boolean holdBrick()
      Holds the current brick for later use. If no brick is currently held, stores the current brick and creates a new one. If a brick is already held, swaps the current brick with the held brick.
      Returns:
      true if the hold operation was successful, false otherwise

    • getHeldBrick

      Brick getHeldBrick()
      Gets the currently held brick.
      Returns:
      the held brick, or null if no brick is held

    • getGhostBrickY

      int getGhostBrickY()
      Calculates the ghost brick position (where the brick would land if dropped straight down). The ghost brick has the same shape and x-position as the current brick, but with the y-position adjusted to show where it would land.
      Returns:
      the y-coordinate (row) where the ghost brick would land, or -1 if calculation fails

    • addGarbageLine

      boolean addGarbageLine()
      Adds a garbage line to the bottom of the board. A garbage line is a full row with one random hole.
      Returns:
      true if adding the garbage line causes game over

    • removeGarbageLines

      int removeGarbageLines(int linesToRemove)
      Removes garbage lines from the bottom of the board. Used for combo bonuses in versus mode.
      Parameters:
      linesToRemove - the number of garbage lines to remove
      Returns:
      the actual number of lines removed
